title: Senior Software Engineer - Sonata Software Ventures Solutions - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Sonata Software Ventures Solutions - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Sonata Software Ventures Solutions in Coimbatore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sonata Software Ventures Solutions:
Sonata Software Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sonata Software Ventures Solutions!
